name: Garden Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (12 oz.) French style green beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the first five ingredients to a rolling boil; then let cool to room temperature.
2. Drain and rinse the corn, peas, and pimentos in a colander.
3. Cut up the celery, bell pepper, and green onions.
4. Combine all the cooled ingredients and refrigerate until very cold before serving.
5. This recipe makes a large quantity that can be stored for about a week in the refrigerator. It can also be prepared up to a day or so in advance.
